'''âsh-p-ng''' ('''kashapang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knee|knee]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-p-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knee|knee]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-p-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kashapang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishapang|thishapang]] || [[word:jishapang|jishapang]] || [[word:shishapang|shishapang]] || [[word:kishapang|kishapang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushapang|thuthushapang]] || [[word:jujushapang|jujushapang]] || [[word:shushushapang|shushushapang]] || [[word:kukushapang|kukushapang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushapang|thushapang]] || [[word:jushapang|jushapang]] || [[word:shushapang|shushapang]] || [[word:kushapang|kushapang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushapang|thushapang]] || [[word:jushapang|jushapang]] || [[word:shushapang|shushapang]] || [[word:kushapang|kushapang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshapang|theshapang]] || [[word:jeshapang|jeshapang]] || [[word:sheshapang|sheshapang]] || [[word:keshapang|keshapang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshapang|thothoshapang]] || [[word:jojoshapang|jojoshapang]] || [[word:shoshoshapang|shoshoshapang]] || [[word:kokoshapang|kokoshapang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshapang|thoshapang]] || [[word:joshapang|joshapang]] || [[word:shoshapang|shoshapang]] || [[word:koshapang|koshapang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshapang|thoshapang]] || [[word:joshapang|joshapang]] || [[word:shoshapang|shoshapang]] || [[word:koshapang|koshapang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshapang|thĂŠshapang]] || [[word:jĂŠshapang|jĂŠshapang]] || [[word:shĂŠshapang|shĂŠshapang]] || [[word:kĂŠshapang|kĂŠshapang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashapang|thathashapang]] || [[word:jajashapang|jajashapang]] || [[word:shashashapang|shashashapang]] || [[word:kakashapang|kakashapang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashapang|thashapang]] || [[word:jashapang|jashapang]] || [[word:shashapang|shashapang]] || [[word:kashapang|kashapang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashapang|thashapang]] || [[word:jashapang|jashapang]] || [[word:shashapang|shashapang]] || [[word:kashapang|kashapang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashapang|shashapang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashapang|goshashapang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashapang|gokishashapang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashapangnĂŒ|shashapangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashapangnknĂŒ|goshashapangnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashapangnĂŒ|gokishashapangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashapangshĂ«|shashapangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashapangnkshĂ«|goshashapangnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashapangshĂ«|gokishashapangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashapangro|shashapangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashapangnkro|goshashapangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashapangro|gokishashapangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashapangmu|shashapangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashapangnkmu|goshashapangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashapangmu|gokishashapangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashapangsher|shashapangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashapangnksher|goshashapangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashapangsher|gokishashapangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashapang|shashapang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashapangnkng|goshashapangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashapang|gokishashapang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashapangya|shashapangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashapangnkya|goshashapangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashapangya|gokishashapangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashapangyam|shashapangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashapangnkyam|goshashapangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashapangyam|gokishashapangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashapangnĂŒshĂ«|shashapangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashapangnknĂŒshĂ«|goshashapangnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashapangnĂŒshĂ«|gokishashapangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashapangnĂŒro|shashapangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashapangnknĂŒro|goshashapangnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashapangnĂŒro|gokishashapangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashapangnĂŒmu|shashapangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashapangnknĂŒmu|goshashapangnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashapangnĂŒmu|gokishashapangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashapangshĂ«nĂŒ|shashapangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashapangnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshashapangnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashapangshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishashapangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashapangshĂ«ro|shashapangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashapangnkshĂ«ro|goshashapangnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashapangshĂ«ro|gokishashapangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashapangshĂ«mu|shashapangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashapangnkshĂ«mu|goshashapangnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashapangshĂ«mu|gokishashapangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashapangronĂŒ|shashapangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashapangnkronĂŒ|goshashapangnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashapangronĂŒ|gokishashapangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashapangroshĂ«|shashapangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashapangnkroshĂ«|goshashapangnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashapangroshĂ«|gokishashapangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashapangromu|shashapangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashapangnkromu|goshashapangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashapangromu|gokishashapangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashapangmunĂŒ|shashapangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashapangnkmunĂŒ|goshashapangnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashapangmunĂŒ|gokishashapangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashapangmushĂ«|shashapangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashapangnkmushĂ«|goshashapangnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashapangmushĂ«|gokishashapangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashapangmuro|shashapangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashapangnkmuro|goshashapangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashapangmuro|gokishashapangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
